# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservices-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: your-docker-repo/microservices-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        env:
        - name: ENVIRONMENT
          value: "production"
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
          runAsGroup: 3001
          fsGroup: 2001
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: microservices-app
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-ingress
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
spec:
  rules:
  - host: microservices-app.example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-app-service
            port:
              number: 80
